locations.name: Brixham
locations.headline: Hull Cleaning & Inspection in Brixham
locations.character: Working fishing harbour first, marina second. One of England's most significant fishing ports by catch value — the birthplace of trawling.

foulingFactors.title: High Nutrient Load
foulingFactors.description: Active fishing harbour with higher nutrient load from fishing waste — accelerating marine growth on hulls.

foulingFactors.title: Channel Exposure
foulingFactors.description: South-facing bay exposure to English Channel currents brings warm, organism-rich water into the harbour.

foulingFactors.title: Extended Fouling Season
foulingFactors.description: Gulf Stream-influenced waters extend the fouling season well beyond the summer months.

foulingFactors.title: Heavy Vessel Traffic
foulingFactors.description: Mixed commercial and leisure vessel traffic increases debris and biological material in the water.

locations.contentAngle: Position HullSafe as part of Brixham's maritime heritage — where England's fishing tradition meets 21st-century marine technology.

locations.name: Torquay
locations.tagline: Premium Care for the English Riviera
locations.headline: Hull Cleaning & Inspection in Torquay
locations.character: The English Riviera — Torquay is the premium end of Torbay, primarily leisure motor-yachts and sailing yachts with larger, higher-value vessels.

foulingFactors.title: Larger Vessels
foulingFactors.description: Vessels up to 30m mean bigger cleaning jobs — and more surface area for fouling to take hold.

foulingFactors.title: 5 Gold Anchor Standards
foulingFactors.description: MDL's premium accreditation demands regular hull maintenance to match the marina's high standards.

foulingFactors.title: Rising Expectations
foulingFactors.description: Recent MDL investment in pontoons and facilities raises the bar for vessel presentation and care.

foulingFactors.title: High Visibility
foulingFactors.description: Town centre location means your hull condition is noticed — by fellow berth holders and marina staff alike.

locations.contentAngle: Premium hull care for the English Riviera — where professional service meets world-class marina facilities.

locations.name: Dartmouth
locations.headline: Hull Cleaning & Inspection in Dartmouth
locations.character: The River Dart presents fundamentally different fouling conditions. Freshwater from Dartmoor meets seawater in a tidal estuary — creating unique challenges for hull maintenance.

foulingFactors.title: Brackish Estuary
foulingFactors.description: Tidal estuary with fluctuating salinity — freshwater from Dartmoor meets seawater, creating unique fouling conditions.

foulingFactors.title: Agricultural Runoff
foulingFactors.description: Nutrient-rich water from Dartmoor agricultural runoff accelerates biofouling growth on hulls.

foulingFactors.title: Silt Accumulation
foulingFactors.description: Fine sediment and silt carried by the river settles and accumulates on hull surfaces.

foulingFactors.title: Stationary Moorings
foulingFactors.description: Many vessels on stationary swing moorings — no movement means faster, heavier fouling.

foulingFactors.title: Invasive Species Risk
foulingFactors.description: Dart Harbour actively concerned about invasive alien species transfer between vessels.

locations.contentAngle: Your hull faces different enemies on the River Dart. We know every one of them.
